title: pix_active_participants
description: Schema for the active Pix participants dataset derived from the official Banco Central Pix participant publication.

source_record_id.description: Stable per-snapshot identifier for the source row.

institution_name.description: Normalized institution name derived from the official source.

short_name.description: Reduced or short institution name derived from the official source.

institution_type.description: Institution type as published by the official source.

spi_participation_type.description: SPI participation type in normalized human-readable form.

pix_participation_type.description: Pix participation type in normalized human-readable form.

pix_participation_mode.description: Pix participation mode in normalized human-readable form.

is_authorized_by_bcb.description: Whether the institution is authorized by Banco Central do Brasil.

catalog_snapshot_date.description: Catalog snapshot date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

source_registry_id.description: Identifier of the official source entry in sources/registry.json.

source_file_url.description: Direct official source artifact URL used for derivation.

schema_version.description: Schema version used to validate this record.

raw_source_json.description: JSON-serialized raw source row. New upstream columns are preserved here first.

initiation_of_payment.description: Whether the institution is an initiator of payment in the Pix source.

facilitator_of_withdrawal_and_change.description: Whether the institution is marked as FSS in the Pix source.
